| +-------------+     |
| |  Handler 1  |<--+ |
| +-------------+   | |
|                   | |
| +-------------+   | |    +------------------+
| |  Handler 2  |<--+------+  Request Router  |
| +-------------+   | |    +------------------+
|                   | |
| +-------------+   | |
| |  Handler 3  |<--+ |
| +-------------+     |
|                     |
|                     |
|                     |
|                     |
|                     |
|                     |
|                     |
+---------------------+
